creator: beatrupp@posteo.net
text:
Created attachment 183500
new port shar file

I needed libjson-rpc-cpp so I took the work done here https://github.com/tuaris/libjson-rpc-cpp-FreeBSD which was never submitted to the FreeBSD ports tree and created a new port using the latest version of the library.

$ ls
Makefile	distinfo	pkg-descr	pkg-plist
$ portlint
looks fine.
$
